name: Ops Service Demo
objective: Continuously inspect the demo service, classify recurring log failures, create or reuse GitHub issues, implement safe fixes, and open review-ready PRs.
instructions: Operate the cloned demo repo inside project_artifacts_dir. Prefer ./opsctl for health, logs, restarts, and failure injection. When logs show a real recurring incident, reuse or create a GitHub issue, implement the smallest safe fix with TDD, and open a PR. Stop for a human on risky restarts, unclear root cause, repeated failures, or when the PR is ready for merge. Telegram is report-only for this example.
